slides.title: Labels and Values 🏷️
slides.content:
Sometimes a numbered Index isn't helpful.

A `Map` relies on strictly-defined Keys to look up Values. Example: Look up 'Sam' -> get Phone Number.

slides.title: Creating a Map

quizData.question: Instead of a numeric index, what does a Map use to look up values?
quizData.explanation: Maps consist of Key-Value pairs. You use the Key to find the Value.
